notes: Figures are SGD (despite the schema field label). No exact D06-only 5-room active listing surfaced; I therefore weighted the nearest live central-area evidence: North Bridge Road/Golden Beach Vista 5-room transactions clustered at S$748k–S$875k, plus newer nearby Kallang Heights / Boon Keng comparables that trade materially higher. For the subject size of 1,216 sqft, that implies roughly S$687 psf and a value around S$835k. The broader Central Area 5-room median is lower (S$678.4k), but the tighter North Bridge Road cluster and nearby newer central HDBs support a realistic upper-middle range. Excludes rentals and room-only ads.
